title: DEVCOM Army Research Laboratory
description: For Federal forms that are not listed on this site, please visit http://www.forms.gov.
text:
This is a collection of forms necessary in order to fulfill your obligations to submit a proposal to the ARL Broad Agency Announcement.
Table of Contents
Publicly Releasable Project Abstract
Army Research Office Proposal Cover Page (ARO Form 51)
Protection of Proprietary Information During Evaluation and After Award (for Industrial Contractors) (ARO Form 52)
Protection of Proprietary Information During Evaluation and After Award (For Educational Institutions / Non-Profit Organizations) (ARO Form 52a)
Project Description
Biographical Sketch
Bibliography
Current and Pending Support
Facilities, Equipment, and Other Resources
Summary Proposal Budget (ARO Form 99)
Contract Facilities Capital Cost of Money (DD Form 1861)
SF Form 424 (R&R)
Research and Related Senior/Key Person Profile
Research and Related Other Project Information
Representations Under DoW Assistance Agreements: Appropriations Provisions on Tax Delinquency and Felony Convictions
ARO Reporting Instructions
ARO Reporting Instructions (Form 18)
SF 298 – Report Documentation Page (DO NOT use when submitting report via the ARO Extranet)
SF 298 – Report Documentation Page Continuation Sheet (DO NOT use when submitting report via the ARO Extranet)
Memorandum of Transmittal
DD Form 882 – Report of Inventions and Sub-Contracts
Downloadable Forms
ARO Form 16 – Proposal Evaluation Form
ARO Form 56 – Instructions for Preparation of Budget/Cost Proposal
ARO Form 95 – Certifications for Educational/Non-Profit Institutions
SF 425 Federal Financial Report
SF 425A Federal Financial Report Attachment
Federal Financial Report Instructions
For Federal forms that are not listed on this site, please visit http://www.forms.gov.
Research Terms and Conditions
Note: These research terms and conditions apply to FDP and non-FDP institutions.
